productDisplayName: U.S.Polo Assn. Men Green Polo T-shirt
description: Style NoteProject your love for the game with this stylish T-shirt from U.S Polo. The classic styling on this tee makes it perfect for casual and semi-formal occasions. Pair this with straight Fit denims and canvas shoes.Product DetailsGreen polo T-shirt, has a spread collar with contrast panelling on the collar, chest buttoned placket, short sleeves with ribbed cuffs, branding embroidered on the left chest and a vented hemMaterial and CareWash dark colours separatelyMachine wash or hand wash cold using a mild detergentDo not wring, bleach, or iron on printFlat dry in shadeSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
